title: Pan-Seared Pork Chops with Greek Sauce
description: A classic Greek-inspired dish featuring pan-seared pork chops served with a rich and tangy Greek sauce.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Sear pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer pork chops to a plate and let rest.
Reduce heat to medium and add garlic to the skillet.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add red wine vinegar, lemon juice, honey, and dried oregano to the skillet.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until sauce has thickened slightly.
Return pork chops to the skillet and coat with Greek sauce.
